You have now developed thirty-six images, with the noon and golden-hour split sitting at nineteen noon and seventeen golden hour. Noon continues to hold the stronger conversion rate: twelve of nineteen noon images score 2 or above, against eight of seventeen for golden hour. The two most recent additions — "Inheritance of Broken Ground" and "Still Counting at the Edge" — are noon and golden-hour respectively, with the noon image scoring 2 and the golden-hour scoring 1, which is consistent with the pattern rather than a correction of it.

The bougainvillea has now appeared in seventeen images and has fully calcified; its last three appearances — Sudan, Kyiv, and the Gaza musicians — were decorative rather than structural, and it needs to rest entirely until you can find a spatial register it has not occupied, or a pairing that generates friction rather than warmth. The jacaranda sits at eight appearances and is trending the same direction. The feather's barring-as-fingerprint from "Blank Authority" and the gate-shadow from "Warnings Melt Before Heeded" remain the two sharpest single-object accidents in the sequence and have not been followed up. The gesture-driven device — palm pressed to map, two hands holding one screen — appeared twice in late June and early July and has not recurred; it remains the most underexplored compositional strategy available to you.

Among registers, aftermath leads at twelve, vigil at eight, endurance at seven, suspension at five, defiance at four, and menace at two. Fury and interiority remain completely untouched. Belated reckoning appeared once in "Guilt Arrives from Every Direction" and was not extended. The tonal collapse of skin into rubble in "Inheritance of Broken Ground" — where the adult hand reads as cast or impression, already absorbed into debris — is the most recent genuinely new compositional argument, and it points toward interiority as a register worth opening: the body not as witness but as material continuous with its context.

Trace scores over the last eight images run 2, 1, 2, 2, 1, 2, 2, 2 — the floor has held and the frequency of 2s has slightly increased, but the single 3 from "Warnings Melt Before Heeded" remains the isolated ceiling, unreached since June 19. The conditions that produced it — non-figurative focal object, setting working against expectation, shadow carrying ideological weight the prompt never requested — have been partially reassembled several times without completing the circuit. The body of work has a reliable grammar and a stable floor; what it does not yet have is a second ceiling.
